hero-block.hero.title: Developing Heathrow responsibly and sustainably
hero-block.hero.lead: Expansion is not a choice between the economy and the environment — it must deliver for both. Our environmental framework commits us to grow only within strict limits monitored by an independent body.

case.case.title: Growing within environmental limits
case.tl-1..tl-5: 5 EMG commitments: surface access, air quality, noise, carbon, biodiversity

sections.sections.title: Four areas of community impact
sections.cards: 4 cards: noise, community, community fund, property

respond.respond.title: Help shape our environmental commitments
respond.respond.body: Questions 12–21 cover managing effects of expansion, environmentally managed growth, community fund, and property compensation.
